summary: Replaced the assembly implementation of the Target Test Koopa stage file with a matching C translation. The PR deleted asm/melee/gr/grtkoopa.s, added src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.c and src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.h, and updated obj_files.mk to build grtkoopa.c.o instead of grtkoopa.s.o. The C file reconstructs the stage data table, callback table, stage initialization callbacks, GObj creation path, and small stage callback stubs while preserving still-unknown symbol names.

key_files.role: Deleted original assembly implementation, including text and data for grtkoopa.
Added matched C implementation for grtkoopa stage callbacks, StageCallbacks table, StageData object, and GObj setup logic.
Added static prototypes and includes needed by grtkoopa.c.
Swapped build input from asm/melee/gr/grtkoopa.s.o to src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.c.o.

what_changed: Added src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.c with 137 lines of C implementing the same stage logic.
Added a static StageCallbacks lbl_803E8C70[4] table matching the former .data callback table, including callback groups and the 0xC0000000 flag value in the third entry.
Added extern StageData lbl_803E8CCC with map id 0x31, callback table pointer, data file path "/GrTKp.dat", and the same function pointer layout visible in assembly.

Implemented lbl_8022164C to set stage_info.unk8C.b4 to 0, stage_info.unk8C.b5 to 1, spawn/setup GObjs 0, 1, and 2 via func_802216EC, then call common stage setup functions func_801C39C0, func_801C3BB4, func_801C4210, and func_801C42AC.

Implemented func_802216EC as the central GObj setup helper: it indexes lbl_803E8C70 by gobj_id, calls func_801C14D0, clears Map x8_callback and xC_callback, installs GX link func_801C5DB0 with GObj_SetupGXLink, applies callback3 to map->x1C_callback, invokes callback0 if present, registers callback2 via func_8038FD54 if present, and reports failure through OSReport.

Translated several short callbacks into C stubs or simple return functions, preserving labels such as lbl_802216BC, lbl_80221800, lbl_80221808, lbl_8022180C, lbl_8022189C, lbl_80221918, lbl_8022191C, and lbl_80221924.
Used Map fields from gobj->user_data and hsd_obj/map_id access patterns to express stage object callbacks such as lbl_802217D4, lbl_80221810, lbl_80221868, lbl_802218A0, and lbl_802218F8.
Updated obj_files.mk so TEXT_O_FILES builds $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/gr/grtkoopa.c.o instead of $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gr/grtkoopa.s.o.
smart_moves: Kept unknown function and label names rather than inventing names, which preserves address/symbol continuity for a matching-focused PR.
Modeled the assembly .data block as typed StageCallbacks and StageData structures, making the callback layout searchable and reusable for nearby grt* stage files.
Introduced explicit Map field accesses such as x8_callback, xC_callback, x1C_callback, and map_id instead of raw offsets, improving readability while matching the assembly behavior.
Used NULL and 0UL in callback/data table entries to control emitted data layout while expressing the original zero words semantically.
Preserved the OSReport failure path and diagnostic string content from the assembly-derived data, including the gobj id parameter.
Added small unused local arrays in callbacks that interact with func_801C2ED0/func_801C8138, likely as a stack-shaping tactic to match the original prologue/stack frame.
decomp_lessons: For stage files with a deleted assembly .data section, reconstruct callback tables first; the function pointer layout often explains the otherwise-anonymous lbl_* callback roles.

When matching grt* stage files, the StageData entry should mirror the assembly order exactly: stage id, StageCallbacks pointer, data file path, lifecycle callbacks, per-stage flags, and trailing NULL/zero entries.
A central GObj setup helper can often be expressed by indexing a StageCallbacks array by gobj_id, then applying callback0/callback2/callback3 conditionally.
Bitfield names in shared structs can turn rlwimi/lbz/stb sequences into readable assignments, as with stage_info.unk8C.b4 and stage_info.unk8C.b5.
Tiny blr-only assembly labels usually become static empty functions, and labels that load constant 0 or 1 become simple static return functions.
Keep placeholder lbl_* and func_* names when the PR evidence does not establish real semantic names; this avoids over-naming while still landing a match.
Build-system migration for matched files requires moving the object path from asm/...s.o to src/...c.o in obj_files.mk.
naming_conventions: The PR keeps address-derived names for unknown functions and callbacks, such as func_80221648, func_802216EC, lbl_8022164C, lbl_802217D4, and lbl_80221924.
The stage source/header filenames use the lowercase stage module name grtkoopa.c and grtkoopa.h.
The data file path in StageData is "/GrTKp.dat", preserving the mixed-case asset naming from the original data.
The callback table remains named lbl_803E8C70 and the StageData object remains named lbl_803E8CCC, matching existing symbol-address naming.
The header guard is _grtkoopa_h_, matching the local lowercase filename rather than a project-wide uppercase guard style.
Struct fields used in the C translation include StageCallbacks callback0, callback2, callback3 and Map x8_callback, xC_callback, x1C_callback, map_id.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted the assembly .data callback table into a static StageCallbacks array with four entries, including a sentinel all-NULL final entry.
Converted packed string words from assembly into C string literals for "/GrTKp.dat", "grtkoopa.c", and the OSReport format string.
Represented assembly zero words with NULL or 0UL depending on pointer-like versus integer-like table positions.
Matched gobj setup control flow with explicit NULL checks before writing map->x1C_callback, calling callback0, and registering callback2.
Used static prototypes in grtkoopa.h so functions could be referenced by the callback table and StageData before their definitions.

Preserved exact constants that appear in assembly, including stage id 0x00000031, callback flag 0xC0000000, GObj_SetupGXLink priority/id values 3 and 0, func_8038FD54 argument 4, OSReport line value 195, and StageData flag 0x00000001.
Added unused stack locals in two callbacks to match stack behavior around calls that operate on gobj->hsd_obj and map->map_id.

review_feedback.feedback: No issue comments or review comments were present in the provided slice. The PR had one review and was merged quickly, but the slice does not show review body text or specific reviewer feedback.

follow_up_queries: Find neighboring grt* stage match PRs that use the same StageCallbacks and StageData pattern.
Search for later renames of lbl_803E8C70, lbl_803E8CCC, or func_802216EC to see if semantic names were eventually assigned.
Compare grtkoopa.c with grtlink.c, grtluigi.c, and other Target Test stage files for reusable callback table structure.
Check whether the static prototypes in grtkoopa.h were later moved into the C file or renamed as project header conventions evolved.
Search for other stage_info.unk8C.b4/b5 assignments to understand the stage flag semantics.
